unfinished_methods.failure_reason: A fresh direct verification run of the hybrid script consumed the full 480s budget and was killed with returncode 137, with no early stderr/stdout. Process inspection showed it was CPU-active rather than immediately blocked on import or syntax failure.
actionable_next_fixes: If trigger verification is required, instrument the script with early flush=True progress prints around trigger windows or reduce dataset length for a verification-only run.
Run on a quieter machine; concurrent PSINS jobs were already saturating CPU during this pass.

notes: Existing successful shadow/hybrid result files already show completed runs for shadow_hybrid_update and hybrid_shadow_kf, but the fresh direct verification rerun could not complete within the subagent budget.
Existing llm_staged_graduation stdout shows LLM client initialization succeeded but each review round hit connection error, so staged logic ran in fallback/no-graduation behavior.
During this subagent pass, other PSINS jobs were already running concurrently on the host, including attention/LLM-tuning runs, which likely reduced reproducibility and throughput.
